user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm the governance parent run records egress/depth preflight evidence before implementation work proceeds.
prerequisites: The governance parent run exists under .codex/loop-runs/ai-infra-loop-governance-dev.
Governance preflight artifacts are stored under the parent run directory.
steps: Load the governance evaluator scenario contract.
Inspect the parent governance run and validate preflight evidence with validate_governance_preflight_evidence().
Confirm the evaluator reports missing governance artifacts when preflight evidence is incomplete.
expected_outcomes: The contract includes E2E-0 through E2E-7.
validate_governance_preflight_evidence() passes only when egress proof, identity audit, depth smoke, and candidate scoring artifacts exist.
The governance parent run stays in demand-development parent mode with visible current progress.
failure_signals: The scenario contract omits any E2E case.
The evaluator treats missing preflight artifacts as pass.
The parent governance run is missing or not a demand-development parent run.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify governance takes over after the stopped-budget ai_infra expansion run and does not silently resume r11 work.
prerequisites: The stopped-budget expansion run exists at .codex/loop-runs/ai-infra-expansion-2026-07-07-r10/run.json.
steps: Inspect the stopped-budget expansion run metadata.
Inspect the governance parent run metadata.
Confirm the governance run now holds the active demand-development takeover.
expected_outcomes: ai-infra-expansion-2026-07-07-r10 remains stopped_budget.
The governance parent run remains active with child runs and current progress.
No evaluator success depends on creating ai_infra expansion r11.
failure_signals: The stopped-budget expansion run changes to a resumed phase.
The governance parent run is missing child linkage or progress summary.
The evaluator assumes r11 exists.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm needs queue blocked split evidence is preserved in the governance run and child breakdown.
prerequisites: The governance parent run backlog and child_run_ids are available.
steps: Inspect the governance parent backlog and child run list.
Confirm the parent run records the active child and aggregate acceptance progress.
Verify the dashboard API exposes the same parent-child structure.
expected_outcomes: The governance parent run includes child_run_ids and current_child_run_id.
Parent progress shows completed and pending child work.
Dashboard API exposes the parent children array.
failure_signals: The parent run omits backlog, child_run_ids, or aggregate acceptance.
The dashboard hides parent children.
The evaluator cannot correlate the active child with the parent progress summary.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify the governance helper keeps high-value candidate hard gates enforced instead of advisory-only scoring.
prerequisites: Governance candidate scoring artifacts are present in the parent run when preflight passes.
steps: Run governance preflight validation.
Inspect candidate scoring artifact paths recorded for the parent run.
Confirm missing or invalid candidate scoring artifacts fail the evaluator.
expected_outcomes: Candidate scoring artifacts are required by governance preflight validation.
The evaluator surfaces concrete findings when the hard gates are missing or invalid.
Passing preflight records candidate scoring artifact paths.
failure_signals: High-value candidate gating is treated as optional.
The evaluator does not mention candidate scoring gaps.
Preflight passes without candidate scoring artifacts.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm crawler workbench linkage is alive through the source profile snapshot and backend health endpoint.
prerequisites: The source snapshot manifest exists under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/.
Crawler workbench backend is reachable at http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/health.
steps: Load the source snapshot manifest.
Validate that it has nonzero channel and source counts and contains no sensitive fields or values.
Check crawler backend health.
expected_outcomes: The source snapshot manifest exists and has nonzero channels and sources.
The source snapshot manifest contains no leaked token, cookie, secret, password, credential, auth_ref, or bearer value.
Crawler backend health returns status ok.
failure_signals: The source snapshot manifest is missing or empty.
The source snapshot manifest leaks sensitive fields or values.
Crawler backend health is unreachable or non-ok.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify wiki/API/frontend/dashboard visibility for the governance artifacts and parent run state.
prerequisites: Loop Dashboard is reachable at http://127.0.0.1:8766.
Crawler frontend is reachable at http://127.0.0.1:5173/.
steps: Call the Loop Dashboard parent run API.
Confirm the parent detail includes child runs and source snapshot governance artifacts.
Confirm crawler frontend responds.
expected_outcomes: Dashboard API exposes the governance parent detail.
Dashboard parent detail includes children and the source snapshot governance artifact path.
Crawler frontend responds with a successful HTTP status.
failure_signals: Dashboard API cannot read the governance parent run.
Dashboard parent detail hides children or source snapshot governance artifacts.
Crawler frontend is unreachable.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm the formal suspicion repair loop left durable evidence and no unresolved confirmed bug remains.
prerequisites: At least one governance child run records formal suspicion evidence.
steps: Inspect governance child evaluator results for formal_verification evidence.
Confirm at least one child includes a formal artifact path.
Confirm no child has an unresolved confirmed formal bug.
expected_outcomes: A governance child evaluator result includes formal_verification_artifact_paths.
Formal verification status is pass with no required counterexample reruns remaining.
No confirmed formal bug remains unresolved.
failure_signals: No child run includes formal suspicion evidence.
Formal verification artifacts are missing.
A confirmed formal bug remains unresolved or still requires rerun.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm the governance loop now has checkpoint evidence and is ready for the human merge gate once this final task passes.
prerequisites: The governance parent run and child-006 task are visible in the dashboard.
The evaluator writes result.json under the requested output directory.
steps: Write result.json for the governance evaluator bundle.
Inspect the parent run decision summary and child-006 planning state.
Confirm rerun commands and diagnostics are recorded when the evaluator fails.
expected_outcomes: The evaluator always writes result.json with status, scenario_results, checked, rerun_commands, and diagnostics.
The parent run remains checkpointed with current progress and a visible current child.
The evaluator output is ready for the final human-merge readiness check once all governance artifacts exist.
failure_signals: result.json is missing required fields.
The parent run lacks current progress or current child context.
Failure output omits actionable diagnostics or rerun commands.
